# API Reference

All endpoints are served from the backend HTTP server (default port `8080`).

## Config Analysis

| Method | Path | Description |
| ------ | ---- | ----------- |
| `POST` | `/api/config/analyze` | Parse YAML and return config + findings |

## Health

| Method | Path | Description |
| ------ | ---- | ----------- |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

## Live Metrics

| Method | Path | Description |
| ------ | ---- | ----------- |
| `POST` | `/api/metrics/connect` | Start scraping a Prometheus endpoint |
| `POST` | `/api/metrics/disconnect` | Stop scraping |
| `GET` | `/api/metrics/snapshot` | Latest computed rates and queue data |
| `GET` | `/api/metrics/status` | Connection status |
| `POST` | `/api/metrics/reset` | Reset metrics store |

## Alert Coverage

| Method | Path | Description |
| ------ | ---- | ----------- |
| `POST` | `/api/alert-coverage` | Analyze alerting rules against config |

## OTLP Sampling Tap

| Method | Path | Description |
| ------ | ---- | ----------- |
| `POST` | `/api/tap/start` | Start OTLP sampling tap |
| `POST` | `/api/tap/stop` | Stop tap |
| `GET` | `/api/tap/status` | Tap status + window timing |
| `GET` | `/api/tap/catalog` | Discovered metrics + attribute metadata |
| `POST` | `/api/tap/reset` | Reset tap catalog |
| `POST` | `/api/tap/remotetap/connect` | Connect to a remotetap processor WebSocket stream |
| `POST` | `/api/tap/remotetap/disconnect` | Disconnect from remotetap stream |
